task_completion.description: Access the Northwind Traders business in Manager.io
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Manager.io application is open and 'Northwind Traders' is visible as the active business.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Sales Invoices section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Sales Invoices' tab is selected in the left navigation menu and the list of invoices is displayed.
The screen shows the details or view mode for the specific invoice with reference 'INV-2024-001'.
A file upload dialog, file picker, or 'New Attachment' screen is open while in the context of invoice INV-2024-001.

task_completion.description: Select the correct proof of delivery PDF file
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'proof_of_delivery.pdf' located in the 'Documents' folder (/home/ga/Documents/) is selected in the file picker.

task_completion.description: Confirm the file is successfully attached to the invoice
task_completion.visual_evidence: The view for invoice 'INV-2024-001' displays 'proof_of_delivery.pdf' in its attachments list or shows an attachment indicator with the file.

integrity.description: The agent used the Manager.io graphical user interface to attach the file
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Manager.io web/desktop interface and system file picker, rather than terminal commands (like curl or sqlite3) modifying the database directly.

integrity.description: The agent used the existing file rather than creating a fake one
integrity.visual_evidence: The file picker shows navigation to /home/ga/Documents to select the pre-existing 'proof_of_delivery.pdf', rather than a text editor being used to create a dummy file.

integrity.description: The attachment was added to the correct invoice
integrity.visual_evidence: The attachment is clearly associated with INV-2024-001, not a newly created invoice or a different section of the application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target invoice reference is exactly 'INV-2024-001'. The file to be attached is named 'proof_of_delivery.pdf' and is located at '/home/ga/Documents/proof_of_delivery.pdf'.
